title: Super Mario Galaxy: Sandstorm
description:
My first video!

Song: Sandstorm
Artist/Band: Darude
Program(s) used: Studio Launcher (Pinnacle Studio Plus ver. 10)

This is a video of the Dusty Dune Galaxy of Super Mario Galaxy.  Get ready for a wild ride!

Sorry for the low-ish quality.  That's what comes out of Pinnacle Studios.

(All characters in this video are property of Nintendo.)
